calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-20-2008 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-20-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Saul M. Ferster, Esq. for plaintiff Marc Wilson, who is present.
Megan Oliver Thompson, Esq. appearing on limited scope representation for defendant, Martin Kanarr, who is also present.

This cause came on regularly for settlement conference this day. The parties were present as note above. Settlement discussions were held. Case settled. Parties entered into a signed Stipulation for Settlement and/or Judgment, which was filed with the Court. Settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for premises located at 1055 Fell Street, San Francisco, CA 94117.

JPT Nils Rosenquest, Clerk Clark Banayad, not reported

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-17-2008 Off Calendar
